x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CSM resolution notes are the primary signal for Now Assist CSM case summarization.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Make resolution notes mandatory at CSM case closure via UI policy. Train agents to document resolution steps clearly. Target: 85%+ of closed cases with resolution notes in the trailing 12 months.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[CSM resolution notes are the primary signal for Now Assist CSM case summarization.]]></ai_justification><check_name>CSM Case Resolution Notes</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Resolution note coverage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaMissing = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaMissing.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaMissing.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaMissing.addQuery('resolution_notes', '');
    gaMissing.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaMissing.query();
    var missing = gaMissing.next() ? parseInt(gaMissing.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var populated = total - missing;
    var pct = Math.round((populated / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes (last 12 months, ' + populated + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 85) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes. Now Assist CSM summarization has strong resolution context for AI-generated case summaries.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have resolution notes (target: 85%). Now Assist CSM summarization quality will be reduced for cases missing this data.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: missing + ' closed CSM cases missing resolution notes (' + pct + '% populated). Critical gap — Now Assist CSM cannot generate meaningful case summaries without resolution context.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>CSM</module><number>CHK0000416</number><order>40</order><remediation_guidance>Make resolution notes mandatory at CSM case closure via UI policy. Train agents to document resolution steps clearly. Target: 85%+ of closed cases with resolution notes in the trailing 12 months.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CSM Case Resolution Notes</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
